title: Vertical Locking (VLock)
text: Vertical Locking (VLock) This property locks all displayed data to the above, and including, the specified row. All rows below the row can be viewed by scrolling. VLock = " RowNumber " Example: Setting in ProcScript $entityproperties(ENT1) = "vlock=2" Copy Applies To egrid (Grid) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
